channel.title: Ecency on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in Ecency on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: Riding the Waves on Ecency's Decks 2.0! S2Ep17
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Ecency released a major update earlier this week and it’s probably the best they’ve ever done.

item.title: My New Site
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: So you may notice a change to the site here. It’s not just a blob of links to my social media and podcasts. I’m turning it into my own little corner of the web.

item.title: Ecency: Making Waves
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: The Hive social media front end Ecency released the best update I’ve seen in the almost 3 yrs I’ve been on it. This is outstanding and I check it in this video.
